Spyridia filamentosa
Feathery red seaweed

in red are those listed among the threatened plants of Singapore from Ng, P. K. L. & Y. C. Wee, 1994. The Singapore Red Data Book: Threatened Plants and Animals of Singapore.

Northern shores

ecp: east coast park, tm: tanah merah, prp:pasir ris park,chg: changi, ubn: pulau ubin (other than cj)cj: chek jawa, skd: pulau sekudu, bb: beting bronok, tus: tuas

Southern shores

lab: labrador + berlayar creek, snt: sentosa, cyr: cyrene reef, kus: kusu island, laz: lazarus island, sji: st. john’s island, sis: sisters islands, jng: pulau jong, tkr:pulau tekukor, hnt: pulau hantu, tpg: terumbus pempang darat, tengah and laut, smk: pulau semakau, tsm: submerged reefs off semakau - terumbu raya, beting bemban besar, terumbu bemban, terumbu semakau, rfl: raffles lighthouse, lfa: live firing area (Salu, Sudong, Pawai, Senang, Biola and submerged reefs in the area)

About citing this checklist.

photo index of
seaweeds on this site

all seaweeds

Green seaweeds

sheets, ribbons, filaments

feathery,
serrated strips

spheres, sausages, blobs

fans, disks, branched

Red seaweeds
sheets, ribbons

fleshy stems, beads
soft hairy, feathery

hard branching, encrusting

Brown seaweeds
sheets, ribbons
disks, other shapes
